title: Picture Me
author: nanoodle
desc: Upload a selfie, get it restyled three ways — film, noir, and anime — keeping your identity and pose.

title: Comic Strip
author: nanoodle
desc: Type a one-line idea and get a multi-panel comic — the LLM writes the beats, the image nodes draw them.

title: Character Chat
author: nanoodle
desc: Give a character a personality and a face — chat replies in voice, with a matching portrait and spoken audio.

title: Song Maker
author: nanoodle
desc: Describe a vibe, the LLM writes the lyrics, and the music node turns them into a finished track.
